title: Creamy Ukrainian Pasta Bake
description: A comforting Ukrainian-inspired twist on the classic pasta bake, made with warm and aromatic flavors of Thai cuisine.
instructions: Cook the penne pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the onion and carrots and cook until the vegetables are softened.
Add the mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and stir in the cream. Let the sauce simmer for 2-3 minutes or until it thickens slightly.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked pasta, the sauce, and the grated cheese. Mix well to combine.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with additional grated cheese if desired.
Bake the pasta in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
